content.text: Frame generation inserts interpolated frames between rendered frames, effectively doubling your frame rate.
DLSS-G requires an NVIDIA RTX 40-series or newer GPU.

content.help: Toggle frame generation on or off. Takes effect immediately. (Default: On)
Caps frame rate to your monitor's refresh rate when VSync is disabled. Prevents tearing. Takes effect immediately. (Default: On)
Disables frame generation when menus (Pip-Boy, etc.) are open. Reduces interpolation artifacts in menus but causes a brief hitch on menu open/close. (Default: On)
FSR3 works on all GPUs. DLSS-G requires RTX 40+. XeSS-FG works on any modern GPU (best on Intel Arc). Changing this requires a game restart. (Default: DLSS-G)
How many frames to generate per rendered frame. 2x works on RTX 40+. 3x/4x (Multi-Frame Gen) requires RTX 50+. Clamped to hardware max at runtime. Requires restart. (Default: 2x)
Enables verbose Streamline logging for troubleshooting. Logs go to F4SE/AAAFrameGeneration.log. Requires game restart. (Default: Off)
